source: CFPB Consumer Credit Reports (benchmark distributions) · ISO 8583 response codes

decline_reasons.label: Do Not Honor
decline_reasons.description: Issuer has blocked this card for unspecified reasons

decline_reasons.label: Invalid Card Number
decline_reasons.description: Card PAN failed Luhn check or is not on file

decline_reasons.label: Insufficient Funds
decline_reasons.description: Available balance is below the transaction amount

decline_reasons.label: Incorrect PIN
decline_reasons.description: PIN entered does not match issuer record

decline_reasons.label: Transaction Not Permitted
decline_reasons.description: Transaction type not allowed for this card

decline_reasons.label: Restricted Card
decline_reasons.description: Card is on a restriction list (lost, stolen, fraud)

decline_reasons.label: Chip Read Error
decline_reasons.description: Terminal could not read chip — try swipe fallback

decline_reasons.label: Bank Unavailable
decline_reasons.description: Issuer host is unreachable — offline auth may apply

decline_reasons.label: System Error
decline_reasons.description: Acquirer or network system error — not card related
